policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-15 - Audit for legacy App Service Environment versions'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-15 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Environment Allowed versions
policyDefinition.description: This policy requires App Service Environments to only use version 3. Older versions of App Service Environment require manual management of Azure resources and have greater scaling limitations.

drcp.name: AppServiceEnvironmentAllowedVersions
drcp.controlDesc: Audit for legacy App Service Environment versions

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
Version of the App Service Environment to require.
